scripts.build: esbuild ./src/app.js --bundle --format=esm --splitting --outdir=dist --entry-names=main --chunk-names=chunks/[name]-[hash] --minify && copy /Y src\concept-visualizers.js dist\concept-visualizers.js >NUL && copy /Y src\wasm\physics.wasm dist\physics.wasm >NUL
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run size-check
